ItacPersonItem.Notes: Carnoli is also known to have written an oration celebrating the foundation of the Accademia degli Accesi in Mantua titled Oratio in erectione Academiae Accensorum Mantuae (Bologna: Benatii, 1655). Mention of this publication is found in Martin Lipenius`s Biblioteca realis philosophica (Frankfort, 1682), Melzi`s Dizionario and Maylender`s Storia.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
